content:
🔥 OpenMemory | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide AI agents and LLM applications with persistent, long-term memory, enabling them to retain information and context across interactions without relying solely on stateless models or basic RAG.
✨ Key Features: • Real long-term memory for AI agents • Self-hosted, local-first storage (SQLite/Postgres) • Python and Node.js SDKs • Integrations with LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, Streamlit, MCP, VS Code
📖 Summary: OpenMemory is a self-hosted, local-first cognitive memory engine for AI agents, providing real long-term memory beyond simple embeddings. It offers SDKs for Python and Node.js, integrates with popular agent frameworks, and supports data ingestion from various sources.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
